what: The six-fold subsurface pulse confirmed reaching Millbrook's drinking wells — the pre-Transition system's reach now encompasses the village water supply, not merely the river and irrigation channels
Pell granted permission for Sela to testify at Thursday's elder meeting — on condition that Pell herself stands at the door and holds the right to call it off.
A second anonymous annotation appeared on the Edge District assembly notice board — 'ask the river' — added in fresh ink on filtration run night.
The Harmonic Heights gateline warden agreed to testify at Millbrook's Thursday elder meeting about six-count channel light witnessed three springs ago — placing the conduit pulse at the Heights years

Usnea Beard named the eastern seep's geometry, the six-fold lattice count, and Aevi's assessment — 'operating, not decaying' — before Millbrook's full elder panel. The word 'deliberate' entered the co
Fendt's deliberate act — pouring from a sealed tube into the Echo River ford — witnessed in photonic record by Millbrook's assembled elder panel. The act is now public knowledge in the valley floor's

Usnea named the coordination between Fendt's pour, the Precursor vent aperture signature, and the six-count in plain speech before Millbrook's assembled elder panel — three witnesses from three vantag
Sela crossed the yard and entered the common house threshold before Dresh's first word — the youngest witness is now inside the room's deliberation.

Sela tapped the six-fold rhythm into the Millbrook common house floor before the assembled elder panel — the youngest witness named the pattern from the inside of the stone, confirmed by three vantage
Millbrook's elder panel formally accepted the evidence of an operating Precursor system beneath the valley — the first official governance body in the valley to name it publicly.
Usnea proposed leading a multi-settlement expedition into the Disputed Zone before Millbrook's assembled elder panel — the room could not follow; the gap between evidence and action named openly.

Word of Millbrook's elder decision — and Fendt's public naming — reached the Radiant Plateau Edge District by Day 11 night via the eastern path. Fendt's name appeared in red chalk on the district acco
A filtration array supervisor marked their own subordinate — Fendt — on the Edge District accountability board and filed no accompanying record. A keeper of thirty years has never seen this before.
The lower filtration ledger — containing three weeks of falsified purity readings under Fendt's initials — has been removed from the array-office in the Edge District.
A dead animal was brought back to life in Millbrook's upper meadow — no known ability in the valley's three civilizations accounts for it cleanly

A death-binding ceremony was completed at Pell's forge in Millbrook — runes pressed into wood and iron with a maker's mark seated into the blade. The spear holds a nascent thread to Huginn and an open
Sow killed cleanly in the north wood — boar sounder now reduced; piglets scattered north into deeper scrub
Bull boar taken on the scrub oak ridge north of Millbrook — the hunt party completed the job, both animals down.
Fendt has left the Edge District and is walking to Millbrook — his testimony names Overseer Grael explicitly; when he arrives, the paper becomes a political event in both settlements.
Two road opportunists at the limestone bend were disarmed and sent to Mara Wells in Millbrook for honest work — Silas Weir's name given as introduction
Compound rune-work — Wither and The Raised Thing — bound an eleven-year rising in the old Ashwarden warden post at Raven's Home.
The first Ashwarden ending attended at the Raven's Home ground since its reclaiming — a plain death, witnessed without ceremony, in the hollow below the southeast birch line.
Silas Weir named Overseer Grael formally to Warden Coll as the receiving authority in the filtration accountability chain — on the record, in the Registry office, with a document roll in hand
